title: CitFancy
description: Enable OptiFine CIT textures on Fabric using Fabric API
body:
CitFancy brings support for OptiFine-style CIT (Custom Item Textures) to Fabric.

With this mod, resource packs that rely on CIT features (commonly used in OptiFine) can now work on Fabric without requiring OptiFine itself.

✨ Features:
- Enables CIT (Custom Item Textures) on Fabric
- Compatible with most OptiFine CIT resource packs
- Lightweight and optimized
- No gameplay advantage — purely visual

📦 Requirements:
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

🎮 Usage:
Simply install the mod along with Fabric API and use any resource pack that includes CIT textures. No extra configuration needed.

⚠️ Notes:
- This mod focuses only on CIT support
- Some advanced OptiFine features may not be fully supported

💡 Perfect for players who want OptiFine resource pack features while staying on Fabric.
